pkgmetadata.longdescription: django-easy-auditYet another Django audit log app, hopefully the simplest one.Quick start-----------1. Add easyaudit to your INSTALLED_APPS setting like this INSTALLED_APPS [ ... easyaudit, ]2. Add django-easy-audits middleware to your MIDDLEWARE (or MIDDLEWARE_CLASSES) setting like this MIDDLEWARE ( ... easyaudit.middleware.easyaudit.EasyAuditMiddleware, )3. Run python manage.py migrate easyaudit to create the audit models.4. Thats it Now every CRUD event on your whole project will be registered in the audit models, which you will be able to query from the Django admin app. Additionally, this app will also log all authentication events and all URLs requested.
